original_ad_name: Las Vegas Promo | V1 | Pattern page
primary_text:
Ready for an adventure? 

Buy 4 BFGoodrich KO3 tyres and you could be the lucky winner of an exciting trip to Las Vegas. 

✅ New tyres.
✅ At the best possible price.
✅ Local fitting.

Don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity!
headline: Win A Trip to Las Vegas!
